prompt: I have a function that receives JSON bytes from a message queue and needs to validate it as a list of sensor readings. Each reading has sensor_id (str), value (float), timestamp (datetime), and optional metadata dict. This is in a hot loop processing thousands of messages per second. Write the validation code.

assertions.text: Uses TypeAdapter created at module level, NOT inside the function or loop
Uses validate_json() for direct JSON parsing instead of json.loads() + validate_python()
Does NOT instantiate TypeAdapter inside a loop or per-call
